name: Fee Reminder Template
subject: Fee Reminder — {{month}} {{year}}
body_html:
Dear Parent,

This is a reminder that the fee for {{month}} {{year}} is due by {{due_date}}. Kindly ensure timely payment.

Amount Due: ₹{{amount}}

Regards,
Sri Gowthami Institutions

name: Attendance Alert Template
subject: Attendance Alert — Low Attendance Warning
body_html:
Dear Parent,

Your child's attendance has fallen below {{threshold}}%. Current: {{current}}%.

Please ensure regular attendance. Further absence may require explanation.

name: Exam Notice Template
subject: Exam Schedule — {{exam_name}}
body_html:
Dear Parents and Students,

The {{exam_name}} is scheduled as per the timetable below. Students must carry their ID cards.

{{timetable}}

name: Event Notice Template
subject: Event Notice — {{event_name}}
body_html:
Dear Parents,

We are pleased to announce {{event_name}} on {{date}}. {{details}}

Parents are cordially invited.
